result.stdout:
Navigate through filesystem and pick a directory to stdout.

Usage:
    > fn {flag}

Flags:
    -m          sort by modified date (defaults to sorting by name)
    -a          sort by accessed date

Example:
    > cd (fn)

commands.payload:
Navigate through filesystem and pick a directory to stdout.

Usage:
    > fn {flag}

Flags:
    -m          sort by modified date (defaults to sorting by name)
    -a          sort by accessed date

Example:
    > cd (fn)
